platform: LinkedIn

# Working title

## Hook (first 2–3 lines)

_These lines show before "see more". Make them count._

## Body

_Deliver one clear insight. Use short paragraphs and line breaks for readability._

## Call to action

_e.g. "What's your experience? Share below." / "Read the full story →"_

## Hashtags

#example #example #example

## Assets

- Image/document: `assets/YYYY-MM-DD-slug.png`
- Recommended: 1200×627 (landscape) or 1080×1080 (square)
- Alt text: _describe the image for accessibility_

## Notes

_Tagged people/pages, link to share, document (carousel) outline._
